description: tale-mode (Layer 1) — always-on discipline + autonomous goal loop. A SessionStart hook injects tale-mode's core disciplines (verify-against-source / foundation-first / two-strike) into every session as additive static text (overrides nothing). A deterministic Stop gate (bash) keeps the turn going until an armed .claude/active-goal.json check passes; silent (and free) when no goal is armed, bounded by the goal-file's max_rounds + a fail-open. The optional Layer-2 Sonnet governor ships as a separate companion plugin: tale-mode-governor.
